task_description: find all JSON files, identify values that appear in multiple files, generate a cross-reference report, and save it to Markdown

messages.content:
execution trace:
stdout:

return code: 0

```sh
cat json_files.txt | xargs jq '.[]' | sort | uniq -c | awk '$1>1 {print $2}' > common_values.txt
```
